ddls:
CREATE TABLE "telework_survey" (
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each survey entry */,
  "organization_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the organization participating in the survey */,
  "directed_telework" INTEGER /* Indicates if telework was directed by the facility */,
  "duration_type" TEXT /* Length of time staff were directed to telework (e.g., 0-2 weeks) */,
  "percentage" REAL /* Percentage of staff affected by the telework decision */,
  "survey_date" TEXT /* Date when the survey was conducted */,
  "employee_count" INTEGER /* Total number of employees in the organization during the survey period */,
  "telework_policy_effectiveness" INTEGER /* Rating (1-5) indicating how effective the telework policy was */,
  "mental_health_impact" INTEGER /* Rating (1-5) indicating the impact of telework on employee mental health */,
  "productivity_change" REAL /* Percentage change in productivity due to telework */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Any additional comments or observations from the survey */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("survey_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_telework_survey_organization_id FOREIGN KEY ("organization_id") REFERENCES organizations ("organization_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "organizations" (
  "organization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each organization */,
  "organization_name" TEXT /* Name of the organization */,
  "size" TEXT /* Size of the organization (e.g., small, large) */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector of the organization (e.g., academic, non-academic) */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the organization */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Specific industry the organization belongs to */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location (city, state, country) of the organization */,
  "employee_count" INTEGER /* Total number of employees in the organization */,
  "establishment_year" INTEGER /* Year the organization was established */,
  "telework_policy_link" TEXT /* Link to the organization's telework policy document */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("organization_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "telework_length" (
  "length_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each length of telework */,
  "length_description" TEXT /* Description of the telework length (e.g., 0-2 weeks, 2-4 weeks) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("length_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "percentage_by_size" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size category */,
  "size" TEXT /* Size of the organization (e.g., Small, Large) */,
  "percentage" REAL /* Percentage of staff teleworking in this category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "percentage_by_sector" (
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sector category */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector of the organization (e.g., Academic, Non-academic) */,
  "percentage" REAL /* Percentage of staff teleworking in this sector */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "telework_statistics" (
  "statistic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic entry */,
  "organization_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the organization these statistics pertain to */,
  "total_telework_percentage" REAL /* Total percentage of telework across all surveyed staff */,
  "average_duration" TEXT /* Average duration of telework for this organization */,
  "telework_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of telework (e.g., daily, weekly, bi-weekly) */,
  "average_productivity" REAL /* Average productivity of employees during the telework period */,
  "average_mental_health_score" REAL /* Average mental health score of employees during the telework period */,
  "telework_policy_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the telework policy */,
  "telework_policy_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the telework policy */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("statistic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_telework_statistics_organization_id FOREIGN KEY ("organization_id") REFERENCES organizations ("organization_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for logging into the platform */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, analyst, admin) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the platform */,
  "access_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access occurred */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of action performed (e.g., login, data export) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the user accessed the platform */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the platform */,
  "session_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the user's session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user providing the feedback */,
  "feedback_text" TEXT /* Text of the feedback provided */,
  "submitted_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the feedback was submitted */,
  "resolved" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the feedback has been resolved */,
  "resolution_date" TEXT /* Date when the feedback was resolved */,
  "resolution_comments" TEXT /* Comments or actions taken to resolve the feedback */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of data source (e.g., survey, report) */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL for accessing the data source */,
  "source_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the data source */,
  "data_refresh_rate" TEXT /* Frequency at which the data source is refreshed (e.g., daily, weekly) */,
  "last_refresh_date" TEXT /* Date when the data source was last refreshed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)
